rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 23, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT ONY HOMES, LLC, PREMIER ESTATES, INC., ANTON DANILOVICH's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens, Or In The Alternative To Require An Undertaking GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIXTEENTH STREET HOTEL, LLC VS. JEFFREY WINN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft'S And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft'S
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 23, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFF SIXTEENTH STREET HOTEL, LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft'S And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft'S GRANTED. Defendant has not produced any responses within the statutory time period under CCP sections 2030.260(b), 2031.260(b), and 2033.250(b). Sanctions are GRANTED in the amount of $1260. = (501/REQ)
